display_update_instruction: Use the matmul-doc-sync skill or an equivalent narrow doc-refresh pass to update `README.md`, `blog/harness-engineering-human-in-the-loop-cuda-matmul/index.md`, and the rendered optimization tree, then commit only those doc/image files.
continue_instruction: Continue now: run `python scripts/graph.py node_b` if the node_b context is stale, spawn one diagnosis sub-agent with `docs/node_b_protocol.md` + `state/node_b_context.md`, then run `python scripts/graph.py node_b --finalize`.
notes: Prepare node_b context if needed, spawn a diagnosis sub-agent, then finalize node_b from the main Codex agent.
